fields.title: First Name & Last Initial
fields.description: Enter your first name and last initial.

fields.title: Match Number
fields.description: Select the match number.

fields.title: Team Number
fields.description: Enter the number of the team you are scouting.

fields.title: Starting Position
fields.description: The starting position of the robot.

fields.title: Swerve drivetrain?
fields.description: Does your robot have a drivetrain that uses swerve (or do they have tank)?

fields.title: Turret?
fields.description: Does your robot have a turret (shooter that can rotate)?

fields.title: No Show
fields.description: Check if the robot did not show up for the match.

fields.title: Fuel Scored in Auto?
fields.description: The number of fuel scored in autonomous.

fields.title: Climbed
fields.description: Did the robot climb during autonomous?

fields.title: Where Climbed
fields.description: Where on the tower did the robot climb in autonomous?

fields.title: Alliance won auto?
fields.description: Did your alliance win the autonomous period?

fields.title: Defended during match?
fields.description: Did the robot play defense during the match?

fields.title: Fuel into outpost?
fields.description: Did the robot supply fuel to the outpost (human player) during the match?

fields.title: Passing Location
fields.description: Where did the robot pass?

fields.title: Passed How?
fields.description: How did the robot pass?

fields.title: Shooter speed (bps)
fields.description: Rate the robot's shooting speed in balls per second.

fields.title: Intake speed (bps)
fields.description: Rate the robot's intaking speed in balls per second.

fields.title: Hopper size
fields.description: Rate the number of blocks the robot's hopper can hold.

fields.title: Climbed
fields.description: The level the robot climbed during endgame.

fields.title: Where Climbed
fields.description: Where on the tower did the robot climb?

fields.title: Mechanical Issue?
fields.description: Did the robot have a mechanical issue during the match?

fields.title: Died?
fields.description: Did the robot die during the match?

fields.title: Tipped/Fell Over
fields.description: Did the robot tip or fall over during the match?

fields.title: Scored while moving?
fields.description: Did the robot score while moving around?

fields.title: Movement between zones
fields.description: How did the robot move between the alliance and neutral zone?

fields.title: Scoring Effectiveness
fields.description: Rate the robot's scoring effectiveness.

fields.title: Intake Effectiveness
fields.description: Rate the robot's intaking effectiveness.

fields.title: Passing Skill
fields.description: Rate the robot's passing skill.

fields.title: Defense Skill
fields.description: Rate the robot's defensive skill.
